CORRELATION MATRIX

In [269]:
correlations = df.corr()

indx=correlations.index
plt.figure(figsize=(10,10))
sns.heatmap(df[indx].corr(),annot=True,cmap="Blues")
Out[269]:
<matplotlib.axes._subplots.AxesSubplot at 0x7f6aaf349190>

CONCLUSIONS

  1. The selling price of the vehicle decreases with the increase in the kilometres driven by the vehicle and the age of vehicle on a majority.
  2. The Average selling price of the vehicle on the basis of fuel is as follows: Diesel > Petrol > CNG > LPG.
  3. On the basis of capacity, the average selling price of 7-seater vehicle is the highest and 14-seater vehicle is the lowest comparatively.
  4. The Higher the Mileage of the vehicle, the higher the Selling Price of the vehicle.
  5. The Mileage of the vehicle reduces inversely with the distance travelled by the vehicle.
  6. The vehicle with less number of seats seems to be having a better mileage than with more number of seats.
